para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER 2026 / P.No. 55 (2) / 2026 / A (S.A. a) (E-1678752)
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
In accordance with the provisions of Rule 5 (1) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005 and the competent authority-
With their approval, the work under the Water Resources Department is mentioned in the accompanying statement (in column-2).
Junior Engineer / Branch Engineer / Assistant Engineer Grade-II Cadre Engineers
In the present working position (Column No. 3) The deadline is being extended.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
